items.title: Core pages contain loading states
items.recommendation: Standardize loading UX coverage across all user/admin surfaces.

items.title: Core pages contain error fallback states
items.recommendation: Add explicit recoverable error messaging for remaining page-level API flows.

items.title: Core pages contain empty-state handling
items.recommendation: Add explicit empty-state UX for list, diagnostics, and evidence screens lacking guidance.

items.title: Upload route exists with auth protection
items.recommendation: Retain auth-required upload and access controls for evidence documents.

items.title: File type and size controls are present
items.recommendation: Add malware scanning and stronger content validation before production scale.

items.title: Evidence source labeling policy exists
items.recommendation: Enforce source label completeness checks on upload/review lifecycle.

items.title: Sensitive data warning and retention policy are explicit
items.recommendation: Add explicit data retention/deletion and sensitive-material handling SOP for operations.
